# MIGRATION_TRACKING.md

## Overview
This document tracks the progress of migrating the codebase from C# to Java. It includes detailed steps, progress dashboards, task checklists, and resources to ensure a smooth and efficient migration process.

---

## **Code Review Checklist**
- [ ] Does the migrated code follow Java best practices?
- [ ] Is the code readable and maintainable?
- [ ] Are there sufficient comments/documentation?
- [ ] Have all tests been ported and passed?
- [ ] Are performance benchmarks met?
